conversation.transcript:
Student: Hey, have you started working on the group project?
Professor: Yes, I have! I think we should meet this week to discuss our ideas.
Student: That sounds good. When are you available?
Professor: I’m free on Wednesday afternoon. Does that work for you?

questions.q: What is the main topic of their conversation?
questions.explain: 他們的對話主要是關於小組專案的。

questions.q: When does the professor suggest meeting?
questions.explain: 教授建議在星期三下午見面。

announcement.transcript: Attention students: The library will be closing early at 5 PM today due to maintenance work. Please make sure to check out any materials you need before then. Thank you for your understanding!

questions.q: Why is the library closing early?
questions.explain: 圖書館因為維修工作而提前關閉。

questions.q: What time will the library close today?
questions.explain: 圖書館今天將在下午五點關閉。

talk.transcript: Today, we will explore the concept of renewable energy. Renewable energy refers to energy generated from natural processes that are continuously replenished. Sources include solar, wind, geothermal, and hydroelectric power. Unlike fossil fuels, which are finite, renewable energy can be replenished naturally. This makes it a more sustainable option for meeting our energy needs while reducing environmental impact. The transition to renewable energy is crucial for addressing climate change and promoting energy security for future generations.

questions.explain: 可再生能源是指來自自然過程的能源。

questions.q: What are examples of renewable energy sources?
questions.explain: 風能和太陽能是可再生能源的例子。

options: It is cheaper than fossil fuels.
questions.explain: 可再生能源有助於減少對環境的影響。
可再生能源可自然補充，這使其可持續。
